sequences.title: Conference Contact Outreach Sequence
sequences.approvalNote: Approved by Martha and Shella. Sequence uses A/B versions per email keyed to contact title and communication style. Email 2 collaborative invite angle was well-received. Timing rationale (48hr / 10-14d / 14d) was explicitly called out as intentional and approved as-is.
sequences.usageNote: Use for any contact made at an in-person or virtual industry event. Do not use for cold contacts with no event connection, or for warm intro referrals.
